creator: conrads@neosoft.com
text:
Attempt to build jbigkit port fails, first with bad checksum,
	then with the following during the patch phase:

root@dolphin:/ports/graphics/jbigkit# make NO_CHECKSUM=yes
===>  Extracting for jbigkit-1.0
===>  Patching for jbigkit-1.0
===>  Applying FreeBSD patches for jbigkit-1.0
patch: **** misordered hunks! output would be garbled
*** Error code 1

Stop.
*** Error code 1

Stop.
*** Error code 1

Stop.
*** Error code 1

Stop.
*** Error code 1

Stop.

	Tried deleting patches and updating via cvsup; same result

Fix: 

Uncertain
How-To-Repeat: 
	Try building graphics/jbigkit (needed by apsfilter)
